Index.title: Total control of your industry, module by module
Index.subtitle: Nexin (Next Industries) is the definitive digital ecosystem for the industrial sector. Robust, scalable, and from the future.

Features.title: Ecosystem Pillars
Features.feature1_desc: Modules that work independently but communicate perfectly.
Features.feature2_desc: Unified identity and access management for the entire ERP.
Features.feature3_desc: Automation and absolute visibility of all your operations.

Footer.cta: The next generation of manufacturing and business OS.
